description: Configures Okta Identity Governance access request workflows, self-service settings, and messaging integrations (Slack/Teams). Defines how end users request access to applications and resources, what information they must provide, and how requests flow through the organization.
terraform_support_notes: Access request policy shell created via okta_policy (ACCESS_POLICY type). Request form fields, justification requirements, and duration limits require Okta Governance API v2024.06+ or manual configuration in the OIG admin console. Slack/Teams notifications use standard okta_event_hook resources and are fully supported.

risk_profile_effects.standard: Self-service enabled. No justification or ticket required. 90-day max request duration.
risk_profile_effects.elevated: Self-service enabled. Business justification required. 60-day max request duration.
risk_profile_effects.strict: Self-service enabled. Justification and ticket number required. 30-day max request duration.

risk_profile.label: Risk Profile
risk_profile.client_description: Controls default request requirements. Higher tiers require more documentation from requesters.

enable_self_service_requests.label: Enable Self-Service Requests
enable_self_service_requests.client_description: Allow employees to request access to applications through the Okta dashboard. When disabled, all access must be provisioned by IT administrators.

request_justification_required.label: Require Business Justification
request_justification_required.client_description: Require users to enter a business justification when requesting access. Creates an audit trail explaining why access was needed. Recommended for regulated environments.

request_ticket_required.label: Require Ticket Number
request_ticket_required.client_description: Require users to enter a ticket number (ServiceNow, Jira) when requesting access. Links access requests to change management records. Required for SOX and FedRAMP compliance.

max_request_duration_days.label: Maximum Request Duration (days)
max_request_duration_days.client_description: Maximum number of days a single access request can grant. After this period, access is revoked unless the user requests an extension. Shorter durations reduce standing privilege risk.

enable_slack_requests.label: Enable Slack Notifications
enable_slack_requests.client_description: Send access request notifications to Slack. Requires a Slack incoming webhook URL.

enable_teams_requests.label: Enable Teams Notifications
enable_teams_requests.client_description: Send access request notifications to Microsoft Teams. Requires a Teams incoming webhook URL.

slack_webhook_url.label: Slack Webhook URL
slack_webhook_url.client_description: Slack incoming webhook URL for request notifications. Required if Slack notifications are enabled.

teams_webhook_url.label: Teams Webhook URL
teams_webhook_url.client_description: Microsoft Teams incoming webhook URL for request notifications. Required if Teams notifications are enabled.

outputs.access_request_policy_id: Access request configuration policy ID. Null if self-service is disabled.
outputs.self_service_enabled: Whether self-service access requests are enabled.
outputs.effective_max_request_duration_days: Resolved maximum request duration after applying risk profile defaults.
outputs.effective_justification_required: Whether business justification is required after applying risk profile defaults.
outputs.effective_ticket_required: Whether ticket number is required after applying risk profile defaults.
outputs.slack_hook_id: Slack notification hook ID. Null if not created.
outputs.teams_hook_id: Teams notification hook ID. Null if not created.
